text:
Let A = { -1, 0, 1 }. The subset of A having no element is the empty
Solution
set Φ. The subsets of A having one element are
{-1 },{0 },{1 }. The subsets of
A having
two elements are
{-1, 0},{-1,1} ,{0, 1}. The subset of A having
three
elements ofAis A itself. So, all the subsets ofA are Φ, {-1}, {0}, {1}, {-1, O}, {-1, 1},
0, 1} a
and {-1, 0, 1}.
